message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Restart from CTS with CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE=false ==="
echo "Start: $(date)"

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

# Delete the failed CTS step so we restart cleanly
WRAPPER_RUN="runs/wrapper_run"
rm -rf "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts"

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.CTS \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>&1 &

CTS_PID=$!
echo "CTS restart PID: $CTS_PID"
sleep 10
ps -p $CTS_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log
